CONTENT.Personal life: He is named after Youri Djorkaeff and is the son of former Ecuadorian international footballer Néicer Reasco, who was playing for LDU Quito in the same game that Reasco Jr made his debut in.

SUMMARY: Djorkaeff Néicer Reasco González (born 18 January 1999) is an Ecuadorian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Argentine Primera División club Newell's Old Boys and the Ecuador national team.
